raw_consumer_statement:
This is a second dispute as American Express failed in their due diligence review of this fraudulent charge. My original complaint # XXXX has detail about original charge and failure to deliver. The company in question provided a fraudulent shipping information that package was delivered. American Express provided me the shipping info from XXXX tracking # XXXX ( see attached ). I called XXXX and spoke with their XXXX department where they verified the package was delivered to XXXX XXXX which is several XXXX miles from my address. They also verified the name and address of the delivery was not for me. American Express failed to identify this. Also the package said it was shipped from XXXX on XX/XX/24 and arrived in XXXX XXXX  on XX/XX/24. It is logistically impossible for an international package to be delivered in XXXX days. Lastly the website is defunct and the phone number of the company begins with XXXX. I suspect that American Express has gaps in their XXXX review process and it took me to do the research to verify this is a bogus foreign company that has duped XXXX of the largest financial institutions in the world. If this is happening to me then I am sure this is happening to many more people. 

Company in Question XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX
